pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking i heard him, but its just the silence. i dont even know why i bother waking up anymore. everything just feels like a performance of a life that ended months ago.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep space and it hit me... nothing i do actually matters. like, even if i spent my whole life trying to be "good" or "successful," the sun is gonna explode anyway and everything just resets to zero. it feels like we're just glitches in a void that doesn't even care we exist. how can anyone even bother to keep going when the end result is just total nothingness?

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, casting long, dying shadows against these cold stone walls... it feels so fitting, doesn't it? Everything I once held dear has turned to ash and betrayal. There is no warmth left in this world for a soul as broken as mine. I feel as though I am already a ghost, drifting through a life that no longer has a place for me. I just want the darkness to take me... to simply fade away into the night and be done with this agony.
